prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: second-round product logo mascot exploration for CopayGuard, a healthcare cost/copay protection product
Primary request: remake the previous mascot-with-shield logo concepts in a gray and orange brand palette
Style/medium: polished 2D animated character mascot logo, vector-friendly, clean silhouette, modern fintech-healthcare brand, friendly but credible, suitable for an app icon and website header
Composition/framing: centered mascot holding a shield, full character visible, generous padding, simple warm off-white or very light gray background, strong readable shape at small size
Color palette: graphite gray, charcoal, soft silver gray, warm safety orange, muted amber, off-white; orange should be the accent and shield highlight, gray should carry the main body/outline; no teal, blue, green, purple, or red
Constraints: no written text, no letters, no watermark, no photorealism, no busy background, no red cross branding, shield must be prominent, use fewer details than the previous draft
Avoid: scary, childish, hospital logo clone, insurance-company generic, cluttered details, fake text, tiny marks that disappear at icon size
Concept direction: a friendly round guardian character with a small cape, confidently holding a clean shield with a subtle check/protection symbol in orange, approachable and trustworthy.
